Class ProgressTracker.OperationProgress

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.ProgressTracker.OperationProgress
Enclosing class:
ProgressTracker
static class ProgressTracker.OperationProgress extends Object
Progress state for a single operation.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
